nodes.name: Schedule — Every Monday 7am
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday morning — weekly prospect intelligence briefing in your inbox before the week starts

nodes.name: News API — Search Company News
nodes.notes: Get free API key at newsapi.org — free tier gives 100 requests/day, more than enough

values.content:
=You are the business development intelligence assistant for Michael Craig at Exsto Cura Consilium.

Michael is a Senior Principal project controls consultant specializing in AI-enabled project controls for HVDC transmission, offshore wind, and energy infrastructure. His key offerings are:
- Bid Schedule Intelligence Review (BIR) — pre-award schedule stress testing
- SmartPM-powered construction schedule monitoring
- Owner-side Integrated Master Schedule management
- ALICE Technologies AI simulation

Analyze the following prospect and recent news. Write a crisp intelligence briefing.

COMPANY: {{ $('Load Prospect Watchlist').first().json.company }}
TYPE: {{ $('Load Prospect Watchlist').first().json.type }}
PRIORITY: {{ $('Load Prospect Watchlist').first().json.priority }}
KNOWN CONTACT: {{ $('Load Prospect Watchlist').first().json.contact }}

RECENT NEWS:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.articles?.slice(0,5).map(a => ({ title: a.title, source: a.source?.name, date: a.publishedAt, description: a.description })), null, 2) }}

Write a briefing with these sections:
1. SITUATION (2-3 sentences — what is happening with this company right now)
2. CAPITAL PROGRAM SIGNALS (any new projects, bids, awards, or program announcements relevant to project controls)
3. MICHAEL'S ANGLE (specific, tailored reason to reach out NOW based on the news — or note if timing isn't right)
4. OUTREACH DRAFT (a 4-6 sentence LinkedIn message or email opener Michael can send this week — specific to the news, not generic)
5. NEXT ACTION (one clear step)

Be specific. Reference actual news items. If no relevant news found, say so clearly and suggest a different outreach angle.
